subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Dixon, spoken on 1912-11-08
subcodes.first_line: It is in God's hands. Pray for me to return and say: 'O Bahá'u'lláh! Confirm ‘Abdu'l-Bahá in the Cause of God.
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
